student_input: Hello, I got 950 marks in Matric, 880 in FSc and my ECAT score is 230 out of 400. Can I get admission in UET Lahore?

state.student_input: Hello, I got 950 marks in Matric, 880 in FSc and my ECAT score is 230 out of 400. Can I get admission in UET Lahore?
state.advice: Congratulations on having an eligibility status of true and a merit score percentage of 74.84. Given your profile, with 950 marks in matric and 880 marks in FSC, and 230 marks in ECAT out of 400, you have a strong foundation. The merit formula used, with 25% weightage on matric, 45% on FSC, and 30% on ECAT, suggests that your FSC marks have significantly contributed to your merit score. To further improve, consider focusing on your ECAT performance, as it has the potential to significantly boost your merit score. Since you are eligible and have a respectable merit score, you have a good chance of getting into UET Lahore. Keep a close eye on the admission deadlines and requirements, and prepare to submit a strong application.
